ab: tucu a qadav uri kacuin mun ni sinsi a sema gade.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去山上。
en: I will take you to the mountains today.

ab: liav a cacalag i gade aya ti ’ina.
ch: B:媽媽說山上有很多蚊子
en: Mom says that there are lots of mosquitoes in the mountains.

ab: tucu a qadav uri kacuin mum ni sinsi a sema vavua.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去田裡。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: a vaik itjen a temuvulj ta qipu?
en: Are we going to loosen the soil?

ab: uri sema inu itjen tucu a qadav?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: uri kacuin itjen ni sinsi a sema pana.
en: Teacher will take us to the riverside.

ab: uri sema inu itjen tucu a qadav?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: uri kacuin itjen ni sinsi a sema gade.
en: Teacher will take us to the mountains today.

ab: a uri sema pana itjen tucu a qadav?
en: Are we going to the riverside today?

ab: ini, uri kacuin itjen ni sinsi a sema gade.
ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.

ab: a uri vaik itjen a sema gade tucu a qadav?
en: Are we going to the mountains today?

ab: ini, uri vaik itjen a sema vavua tucu a qadav.
ch: B:不是，我們今天要去田裡。
en: No, we are going to the fields.

ab: sinsi, anema uri tja pacunan i pana?
ch: A:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?

ab: vaik a pacun tua quljicacenglav.
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: sinsi, anema uri tja pacunan i gade?
ch: A:老師，我們到山上要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?

ab: vaik itjen a pacun tua kadjiadji.
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: uri kemuda itjen a sema vavua?
en: What are we going to do in the fields?

ab: uri vaik itjen a pacun tua tja sinitalem a puday, kinemnem itjen tua sasiq, tjainan pai!
ch: B:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米，要小心有螞蟻、蜜蜂唷!
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields, but you need to be aware of the ants and bees.

ab: sinsi, a vaik itjen a sema pana a emave’av/ljemanguy?
ch: A:老師，我們要到河邊游泳嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in the river?

ab: ini, uri vaik itjen a pacun tua quljicacenglav.
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: sinsi, a vaik itjen a sema vavua a temalen tua ljaceng?
ch: A:老師，我們要到田裡種菜嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?

ab: itjen a vaik a temuvulj ta qipu.
en: We are going to loosen the soil today.

ab: izua a minlayalayap a quljicacenglav.
en: There are dragonflies flying around.

ab: tjaupacun aken tua qaqulidan a valjualjut a quljicacenglav.
ch: B:我今天才看過真正活著的蜻蜓。
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: izua a minlayalayap a kadjiyadji.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: yi! wa! tjengelay aken aravac tua kadjiadji, bulay aravac.
ch: B:耶! 哇! 我喜歡蝴蝶，很漂亮。
en: Yeh! Wow! I love butterflies. They are very beautiful.

ab: uzai a za minlayalayap a kadjiadji.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: inika kadjiadji azua, tjainan azua.
en: Those are not butterflies. They are bees.

ab: tjimazau a pacun, maya vaivaik a sema cadja yu!
ch: A:在這裡看一看，不要到太遠的地方唷!
en: Come here and take a look. Don’t go too far!

ab: ui, inika men a uri vaik a ljiacadja.
ch: B:好，我們不會去太遠的地方。
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ab: inika tjen a mekekelj, gemalju itjen a djemavac avan a se’ulilj sun.
ch: A:不要用跑的，慢慢走免得跌倒了。
en: Don’t run and walk slowly lest you fall down.

ab: pasa pakirimurimu aken a pacun.
en: I want to see them right away.
